column4: Spew a breath from your mouth which deals varying effects
column5:
Damage = % maxHP dealt per tick
Capacity = Number of seconds breath can be fired before recoil damage
Chain = Percentage value of increased damage per tick of continued application
ChainMaxStacks = Max number of stacks that the chaining effect can have
Critical = Chance to deal increased damage per tick
Ailments = Application of ailments with chance (P) and how much per stack (Stacks)
Regen Rate = How fast the breath recharges a segment
